patch.value: Turn pm-presets from a passive bundle into an active preset-management toolset. Add: presets show <name> (full definition, --json, NOT_FOUND exit 3), presets diff <name> (compare workspace types/statuses/settings vs preset, --json), presets validate (validate all bundled presets parse/load). Enrich presets list output (types/statuses/fields/seed counts). Existing presets list/apply and *-setup commands remain backward-compatible. Real unit tests for pure helpers; functional test against a real workspace; release as 2026.6.3.
Deepen presets toolset: add show, diff, validate, enrich list
